title: AI Decision Log Record
description: A tamper-evident record of a single AI system decision event. Conforms to the AI Decision Logging Specification v0.1.0. Records are chained via previous_hash to form a tamper-evident audit trail.

decision_id.description: REQUIRED. Globally unique UUID v4 identifying this decision event.

timestamp.description: REQUIRED. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the decision event.

schema_version.description: REQUIRED. Version of the AI Decision Logging Specification used to produce this record.

model_version.description: REQUIRED. Stable, deterministic version identifier of the model that produced this decision.

decision_output.description: REQUIRED. The output, classification, recommendation, or action produced. MUST be human-readable. MUST NOT contain PII in public records.

record_hash.description: REQUIRED. SHA-256 hash of the canonical (RFC 8785) record body, excluding the signature field. Format: 'sha256:<64 hex chars>'.

previous_hash.description: REQUIRED. The record_hash of the immediately preceding record. null for genesis records.

policy_version.description: RECOMMENDED. Version of the policy or rule set active at decision time.

session_id.description: RECOMMENDED. Groups related decision events within a single operational session.

input_reference.description: RECOMMENDED. Reference to the input that triggered this decision. MUST NOT be raw personal data. SHOULD be a hash or opaque identifier.

confidence_score.description: RECOMMENDED. Model confidence in the decision output (0.0–1.0).

human_oversight_flag.description: RECOMMENDED. Whether a human reviewed or confirmed this decision before it was acted upon.

artifact_certificate_id.description: RECOMMENDED. Certificate ID of the certified artifact (e.g., training dataset) used by this model. Links the decision to the artifact certification chain.

operator_id.description: RECOMMENDED. Identifier for the deployer or operator responsible for this AI system.

why.description: RECOMMENDED. Human-readable rationale summary for this decision (1-3 sentences). MAY be sterilized for public records. Supports GDPR Article 22 and EU AI Act Article 13.

factors.description: OPTIONAL. Structured list of signals or features that contributed to this decision.

system_id.description: OPTIONAL. Identifier for the AI system or deployment context.

jurisdiction.description: OPTIONAL. Regulatory jurisdiction for this record. Use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or 'EU'.

sterilized.description: OPTIONAL. If true, this record has been sterilized for public or external export — sensitive input fields have been redacted or summarized. Hash chain integrity is preserved.

signature.description: OPTIONAL. Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical (RFC 8785) record body, excluding this field. If present, the signing key MUST be published at a well-known URL.

_comment.description: OPTIONAL. Human-readable annotation for documentation and example files only. Not part of the canonical record body and MUST be excluded before hashing.
